Project Details

Back

Projekt

GRK 6:  Spatial Statistics

Subject Area Mathematics
Term from 1997 to 2003
Project identifier Deutsche Forschungsgemeinschaft (DFG) - Project number 268853
 
  • Project Description
The work of the research training group is directed to the models and methods of spatial statistics, its applications in natural sciences, technology, and computer science as well as the feedback of these applications to form a new application-orientated theory in mathematics and the partner sciences. The main emphasis is on stochastics and physics. The program accompanies and supports young researchers and specialists during the progress of their thesis in order to improve their individual knowledge by offering interdisciplinary contacts. The program includes seminars, lectures and colloquia on special research projects, involving distinguished scientists.
DFG Programme Research Training Groups
Applicant Institution Technische Universität Bergakademie Freiberg
Spokesperson Professor Dr. Dietrich Stoyan
Participating Researchers Professor Dr. Michael Eiermann; Professor Dr. Bernhard Forkmann; Professor Dr.-Ing. Siegfried Meier; Professor Dr.-Ing. Joachim Menz; Professor Dr. Jochen Monecke; Professor Dr. Hans-Joachim Möller; Professor Dr. Wolfgang Näther; Professor Dr.-Ing. Joachim Ohser; Professor Dr. Helmut Schaeben; Professor Dr.-Ing. Ernst Schlegel; Professor Dr. Bernd Steinbach
